testcase.name: test_row_has_score_columns_and_schedule

failure.message: AssertionError: No score columns found in row keys: ['name', 'email', 'phone', 'college_status', 'college', 'match_confidence', 'degree', 'course', 'year_of_graduation', 'job_role', 'schedule_date', 'result_status', 'ZA', 'C++', 'Java', 'BA', 'LA', 'Mensa Org', 'Accounts2', 'Accounts1', 'BE', 'Mensa', 'BP'] assert ('score' in 'name email phone college_status college match_confidence degree course year_of_graduation job_role schedule_date result_status za c++ java ba la mensa org accounts2 accounts1 be mensa bp' or 'round' in 'name email phone college_status college match_confidence degree course year_of_graduation job_role schedule_date result_status za c++ java ba la mensa org accounts2 accounts1 be mensa bp')

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration32_pipeline_applicants.py:164: in test_row_has_score_columns_and_schedule assert "score" in keys or "round" in keys, \ E AssertionError: No score columns found in row keys: ['name', 'email', 'phone', 'college_status', 'college', 'match_confidence', 'degree', 'course', 'year_of_graduation', 'job_role', 'schedule_date', 'result_status', 'ZA', 'C++', 'Java', 'BA', 'LA', 'Mensa Org', 'Accounts2', 'Accounts1', 'BE', 'Mensa', 'BP'] E assert ('score' in 'name email phone college_status college match_confidence degree course year_of_graduation job_role schedule_date result_status za c++ java ba la mensa org accounts2 accounts1 be mensa bp' or 'round' in 'name email phone college_status college match_confidence degree course year_of_graduation job_role schedule_date result_status za c++ java ba la mensa org accounts2 accounts1 be mensa bp')
